# Truzot AI Headshots

> Truzot is an AI-powered professional headshot generator that creates studio-quality corporate, LinkedIn, and executive headshots from a handful of casual selfies in minutes.

## About Truzot
Truzot replaces expensive photography studio sessions with generative AI. Users upload a small set of selfies (as few as 2, with 6-10 recommended for the most accurate likeness), and the platform trains a custom Flux LoRA model on the person's face to generate 40-150 high-resolution professional headshots across a wide range of styles, backgrounds, outfits, lighting, and expressions.

## Core Features
- **Custom AI Model Training**: A private Flux LoRA model is trained on the user's own facial features (not a generic filter).
- **Genuinely Distinct Results**: Every headshot in an order is a unique combination of scene, background, outfit, lighting, and expression.
- **Style Variety**: Categories including Corporate, LinkedIn, Creative, Casual, Actor, Lifestyle/Dating, and Editorial/Model.
- **Fast Delivery**: Headshots are typically delivered within 30 minutes to 2 hours depending on plan.
- **Privacy First**: Uploaded photos and the trained model are encrypted and permanently deleted 30 days after the order completes.
- **Commercial Rights**: Full commercial usage rights are included for all generated images.
- **Money-Back Guarantee**: 30-day satisfaction guarantee.

## Pricing Plans (one-time payment, no subscription)
- **Basic Shoot**: $29 | 40 high-resolution headshots | 2-hour delivery
- **Professional Shoot**: $39 | 100 high-resolution headshots | 1-hour delivery
- **Executive Shoot**: $59 | 150 high-resolution headshots | 30-minute priority delivery

## What Makes Truzot Different
- Needs only 2-10 selfies, versus the 15-25 many competitors require.
- Trains a dedicated per-customer model rather than applying a template or filter.
- No studio, no scheduling, no photographer — results in under an hour for most plans.

## Target Audience
- Job seekers and LinkedIn professionals
- Corporate teams and HR departments
- Real estate agents and sales professionals
- Startup founders and executives
- Actors, models, and creatives

## How It Works
1. Upload 2-10 casual selfies (phone photos in good light work best; 6-10 gives the most accurate results).
2. Optionally add details (age, gender, hair color) and pick styles.
3. Choose a plan and complete secure checkout via Stripe.
4. The AI trains a private model on your face, then generates your headshots.
5. Receive an email with a link to view and download your AI-generated headshots.
